quiz.question:
It is White to move. 

Can White win this game?

feedback.text: Exactly. With White to move, White cannot make progress. This same position is a win if it's Black to move.

distractors.text: Yes, White has an extra pawn!

feedback.text: Yes, White has an extra pawn, but since it's White to move, White cannot help the pawn queen if Black plays this correctly.
